scoring_method.reliability: Primary official sources score highest; public unofficial market-data endpoints are useful but discounted.
scoring_method.relevance: Evidence must connect to rates, liquidity, volatility, holdings, or candidate thesis.
scoring_method.freshness: Intraday tape preferred for market data; FRED and official releases accepted with their publication lag.
scoring_method.claim_type: fact/inference/speculation separated; action posture cannot rest on speculation alone.
scoring_method.confidence: Composite judgment from reliability, relevance, freshness, and corroboration.
